goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 15:30' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'norwich' and should leave on 'monday'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should have 'a star of 3'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should 'include free parking'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '3 people' and '3 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 15:30 and should go to cambridge
The train should depart from norwich and should leave on monday
Make sure you get price and departure time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should have a star of 3
The hotel should include free wifi and should include free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 3 people and 3 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
